title: Cobblemon: Infinite Riding Stamina [1.7]
description: A datapack that removes the stamina limit from Cobblemon 1.7, letting you explore endlessly and travel without interruptions.
body:
**Cobblemon: Infinite Ride Stamina**    ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab805b1b1a059713ffbfa68e105db8b3592c2d66.png)

This is a lightweight datapack designed for servers and players who want smoother, uninterrupted exploration. Instead of constantly worrying about your mount’s stamina running out, this pack keeps your Cobblemon ride-ready so you can focus on adventuring, building and battling.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gL5-nlSf1SM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
